hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | sed -n 's/.*"command":\s*"\(.*\)"/\1/p' | head -1); case "$CMD" in *'rm -rf /'*) echo 'BLOCKED by StoryForge: rm -rf / is dangerous' >&2; exit 2;; *'git push --force'*|*'git push -f '*) echo 'BLOCKED by StoryForge: force push requires explicit approval' >&2; exit 2;; *'git reset --hard'*) echo 'BLOCKED by StoryForge: hard reset requires explicit approval' >&2; exit 2;; *'chmod 777'*) echo 'BLOCKED by StoryForge: chmod 777 is insecure' >&2; exit 2;; *'| bash'*|*'|bash'*) echo 'BLOCKED by StoryForge: piping to bash is dangerous' >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0
